layman_headline: Crypto market is fearful and alts are bleeding — no clear trade worth taking right now.
layman_explanation: The overall crypto market is in a 'Fear' state with a score of 26 out of 100, and Bitcoin dominance is high at 56.3%, meaning money is flowing out of smaller coins (altcoins) and into Bitcoin. Every swing trade candidate on the watchlist has significant problems — either crashing hard with no bottom in sight, already bounced too much, or showing bearish chart patterns. The best candidate, LayerZero (ZRO), has an RSI near oversold territory and exceptional risk/reward on paper, but its chart structure is still bearish and there's no clear catalyst to trigger a reversal.
layman_action: Stay in cash and wait. The market is not offering high-confidence setups right now. Watch for Bitcoin to hold above $64K and for the Fear & Greed index to dip below 20 (extreme fear) — that's historically when the best bounce trades appear.
expert_reasoning: Every candidate was evaluated across technicals, chart bias, and macro context. LAB is in freefall (-92% in 7 days) with strongly bearish charts — a classic knife-catch trap. GRASS dropped 28% in a week but has a terrible 0.48x R/R and bearish engulfing patterns. VIRTUAL popped 14% today but is in a downtrend below all MAs — likely a dead cat bounce. ETHFI has the best chart bias (+0.60) but is already near resistance at $0.40 with only 2.5% upside and a miserable 0.11x R/R. ZRO is the most interesting: RSI 31 (approaching oversold, a historically reliable signal per our track record), 16.5x theoretical R/R, but the bearish structure (-0.70 chart bias) and high BTC dominance suppressing alts make this a wait-and-watch rather than an entry. With Fear & Greed at 26 and improving (also a historically reliable signal), I want to see it either dip to extreme fear for a broad bounce trade, or see ZRO confirm a bottom with a bullish candle pattern.
risk_factors: BTC dominance at 56.3% actively draining capital from altcoins — any alt position faces structural headwinds
Bitcoin's $64K rebound faces a 'big challenge' in 3 days per CryptoSlate, and a BTC breakdown would drag all alts lower
Fear & Greed improving from 23 to 26 could reverse — if sentiment deteriorates back toward extreme fear, alts will suffer disproportionately
watch_list: ZRO RSI breaking below 30 (oversold confirmation) combined with a bullish reversal candle like hammer or morning star
Bitcoin price action at $64K — a close below $63K would signal further downside and kill alt setups
Fear & Greed index — a dip to sub-20 extreme fear would be a high-confidence contrarian buy signal based on our 75% win rate with this indicator
market_context: The crypto market is in Fear (26/100) with BTC dominance elevated at 56.3%, creating a hostile environment for altcoin swing trades. Bitcoin is stabilizing around $64K after a modest weekly gain but faces a critical test in the next few days.
context_banner: High BTC dominance and fearful sentiment make this a patience-rewarding environment — wait for extreme fear or confirmed reversal patterns before deploying capital.

key_signals.description: Fear & Greed at 26 (Fear) and improving from 23 — historically a 75% win rate signal, but not yet at extreme fear levels that produce the highest-conviction entries.
ZRO RSI at 31 is the closest to oversold among candidates — RSI has a 67% win rate in our track record, but needs confirmation from chart structure.
Bitcoin's $64K rebound faces its 'next big challenge' in 3 days, creating uncertainty that makes new alt positions risky.
No volume breakout confirmation on any candidate — all bounces (VIRTUAL +14%, GRASS +8%) lack volume data to validate sustainability.
BTC dominance at 56.3% signals capital rotation away from alts — structural headwind for any altcoin swing trade.
